homepage.tagline.message: How to Use AI the Right Way

homepage.lead.primary.message: Cocrates is an Agent Harness that makes you question, design, and verify.

homepage.lead.secondary.message: Don't hand work to AI — build together through review.

homepage.description.message: Cocrates — Agent Harness for designing, reviewing, and growing with AI.

homepage.section.meaning.message: How to Take Back Control in the AI Era

homepage.section.usage.message: Try It This Way and the Difference Shows

homepage.meaning.user.message: You become Socrates, questioning what AI misses, what it does not know, and what it tries to skip too quickly.

homepage.meaning.ai.message: AI also becomes Socrates, turning vague requests into structure and producing outputs against criteria you designed together.

homepage.meaning.quote.message: Cocrates is not a tool that thinks instead of you. It is a harness that helps you think deeper, decide more clearly, and grow faster.

homepage.install.intro.message: Install {opencodeLink}, then ask AI to install Cocrates Harness as shown below.

homepage.usage.learn.message: Ask what you want to learn. Before dumping answers, Cocrates asks questions that make you understand it yourself. By answering the questions, you deepen your understanding.

homepage.usage.build.message: Ask it to build something. Before writing code, Cocrates reveals which decisions must be made first. By reviewing the decisions, you can create what you want.

homepage.usage.growth.message: Through that process, you become someone who can lead AI to produce the desired result.

homepage.docs.intro.message: It begins with why the same AI creates different results, and ends with a manifesto for using AI properly.

homepage.ep1.summary.message: Why do the same AI tools produce different results? The difference begins with the user's attitude, not the model.

homepage.ep2.title.message: The unexamined code is not worth generating.

homepage.ep2.summary.message: If you cannot understand, judge, and approve what AI made, it is not yet your output.

homepage.ep3.summary.message: Install Cocrates Harness and use it. It is easy and simple.

homepage.ep4.summary.message: Instead of copying answers, respond to questions and discover what you do not yet understand.

homepage.ep5.summary.message: Do not build immediately. Decide first, bind it into a spec, generate, then verify item by item.

homepage.ep6.summary.message: Design not a one-off output, but a reusable generation procedure together with AI.

homepage.ep7.summary.message: Use Agent and Skills instead of one universal prompt, separating the structure of each kind of work.

homepage.ep8.summary.message: Why does Cocrates ask questions instead of explaining right away? Learn the principles that make users grow.

homepage.ep9.summary.message: Learn, record, and verify again. See how three skills turn knowledge into something you own.

homepage.ep10.summary.message: Good outputs come from architecture. Learn the general workflow of generating outputs based on architecture.

homepage.ep11.summary.message: Go deeper into how decision, spec, generation, and verification skills protect quality.

homepage.ep12.summary.message: Create the way you ask AI to work. Explore the meta-skill that designs skills.

homepage.ep13.summary.message: Cocrates is not a finished product. It evolves with the user.

homepage.ep14.summary.message: A declaration to refuse blind trust, keep control, and keep growing with AI.
